focus: A personal D&D storytelling and novel writing assistant

currentCampaign.name: The Shattered Compass
currentCampaign.tone: Mythic fantasy, mystery, and political intrigue
currentCampaign.currentObjective: Recover the obsidian map fragment from the drowned archive.

storyGoals: Track canon across sessions and chapter drafts.
Capture NPC motivations, secrets, and evolving alliances.
Collect scene hooks for both campaign play and novel prose.
Keep a running backlog of themes, symbols, and unresolved threads.
nextMilestones: Add editable campaign notes and scene summaries.
Store chapter ideas and revision checkpoints.
Generate reusable prompts for session prep and prose drafting.
